fieldguide.block.nears.near_hang.descrip: Found in crimson forests, nears (pronounced like pear) grow on vine-like hanging stems. These stems can be broken to craft crimson planks, or kept to grow more nears.
fieldguide.block.nears.faar_growth.descr: Faar Growths can be found hanging from warped fungi, and once fully grown they will become a bundle of faars. Similar to a hay bale, they can be crafted into faars or used to negate fall damage.
fieldguide.block.nears.cinder_grain.desc: The tall grass of basalt deltas, harvesting cinder grass will sometimes produce cinder seeds. Thriving in dry heat, cinder seeds planted on the side of basalt or magma blocks grow cinder grain. A specialty of the nether, the grain can be crafted into cinder sangak.
fieldguide.block.nears.soul_berry_bush.d: A distant relative of the nether wart, soul berries are found in soul-rich environments. Harvested like sweet berries.
